title: Introduce DISABLE_DOCS to skip doc generation while building from source
body: As discussed in https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1411 the commit in this PR introduces a way to disable docs generation while building from source. This will allows `DISABLE_DOCS=1 make install` command to be used on setups where `go-md2man` tool isn't available for doc generation.

comments.body: I'm not aware of the process to have this change committed to `1.4.x` release branch too. But it would be good to have this change in that branch too. If necessary, I can open a separate PR for that branch. Just let me know.

> I'm not aware of the process to have this change committed to `1.4.x` release branch too. But it would be good to have this change in that branch too. If necessary, I can open a separate PR for that branch. Just let me know.

yes, once it's merged in main, you can open a PR for that branch.
The changes LGTM, but it would be nice to have this documented somewhere too.  Perhaps install.md, or maybe contributing.md, or both?
I have pushed a commit to this PR which updates the `install.md` to explain how to skip document generation.
Thank you all for the reviews and merging this. I have now gone ahead and opened https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1447 for the 1.4.x release branch.
